query:
# Context Refresh Failed

workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core

Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size

Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.

transcript.content: 已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：
点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；
这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.

decision.archive_summary: Earlier UI/behavior changes for the standalone Codex Context Monitor were completed: removed the old context meter/live-panel flow, kept a short status-bar label, open a small detail window on click, async refresh with cached/Loading state, and clarified multi-window behavior. Durable requirement from t4: when a VS Code window has no repo workspace, show `Ctx: no workspace`; tooltip should state the currently bound workspace path; each VS Code window refreshes independently against its own workspace.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic is still the same extension/context-monitor workflow, now narrowed to diagnosing `Ctx: error` / context refresh failure. The latest user turn depends on the immediately preceding error-handling exchange, so keep t8-t11 as raw context. Earlier implementation confirmations and click-performance discussion are resolved and can leave the next-turn prompt. The multi-window/no-workspace behavior in t4 is a durable product rule, so preserve it as a semantic pin rather than raw turns.

applied.archiveSummary: Earlier UI/behavior changes for the standalone Codex Context Monitor were completed: removed the old context meter/live-panel flow, kept a short status-bar label, open a small detail window on click, async refresh with cached/Loading state, and clarified multi-window behavior. Durable requirement from t4: when a VS Code window has no repo workspace, show `Ctx: no workspace`; tooltip should state the currently bound workspace path; each VS Code window refreshes independently against its own workspace.
applied.reasoningSummary: The active topic is still the same extension/context-monitor workflow, now narrowed to diagnosing `Ctx: error` / context refresh failure. The latest user turn depends on the immediately preceding error-handling exchange, so keep t8-t11 as raw context. Earlier implementation confirmations and click-performance discussion are resolved and can leave the next-turn prompt. The multi-window/no-workspace behavior in t4 is a durable product rule, so preserve it as a semantic pin rather than raw turns.
